theorem_statement: theorem succ_add_succ_2 (a b : Nat) : Nat.succ a + Nat.succ b = Nat.succ (Nat.succ (a + b)) :=

traced_tactics.state_before:
a b : Nat
⊢ a.succ + b.succ = (a + b).succ.succ

theorem_statement: theorem succ_add_succ_4 (a b : Nat) : Nat.succ a + Nat.succ b = Nat.succ (Nat.succ (a + b)) :=

traced_tactics.state_before:
a b : Nat
⊢ a.succ + b.succ = (a + b).succ.succ

theorem_statement: theorem my_and_comm_3 : ∀ {p q : Prop}, And p q → And q p :=

traced_tactics.state_before: ⊢ ∀ {p q : Prop}, p ∧ q → q ∧ p
traced_tactics.state_after: ⊢ ∀ {p q : Prop}, p → q → q ∧ p

traced_tactics.state_before: ⊢ ∀ {p q : Prop}, p → q → q ∧ p
traced_tactics.state_after:
p q : Prop
hp : p
hq : q
⊢ q ∧ p

traced_tactics.state_before:
p q : Prop
hp : p
hq : q
⊢ q ∧ p

theorem_statement: theorem mul_assoc_my_1 : ∀ a b c : Nat, (a * b) * c = a * (b * c) :=

traced_tactics.state_before: ⊢ ∀ (a b c : Nat), a * b * c = a * (b * c)
traced_tactics.state_after:
a b c : Nat
⊢ a * b * c = a * (b * c)

traced_tactics.state_before:
a b c : Nat
⊢ a * b * c = a * (b * c)
traced_tactics.state_after:
a b c : Nat
⊢ c * (a * b) = a * (b * c)

traced_tactics.state_before:
a b c : Nat
⊢ c * (a * b) = a * (b * c)
